name: gcp-create-monitoring-channel
description:
Create a Cloud Monitoring pubsub notification channel that routes incident notifications to a Pub/Sub topic, via 'POST https://monitoring.googleapis.com/v3/projects/{PROJECT_ID}/notificationChannels'. The POST is NOT idempotent (every call would mint a new channel), so the module first lists existing channels with filter type="pubsub" and matches labels.topic client-side — a re-run finds the prior channel and returns SUCCESS with already_existed=true instead of creating a duplicate. Third of the three Phase C provisioning modules — the self-serve automation of docs/gcp-push-setup.md (topic → push subscription → monitoring channel).

This is a WRITE-capable module: it requires the write-tier Google Cloud OAuth consent granted via '/api/gcp/connect-write' (a SEPARATE consent from the read-only '/api/gcp/connect' flow). Set AUTH_HEADER to a vault:// reference under 'oauth/google_cloud_write/...' — the controller resolves + refreshes the token at dispatch time.

AUTH_HEADER.description: vault:// path to the WRITE-tier OAuth access token wrapped in 'Bearer ' (e.g. 'Bearer vault://oauth/google_cloud_write/{user_id}/{provider_key}/access_token'). The controller resolves the vault reference and refreshes the token if expired. Note the '_write' namespace — the read-tier 'oauth/google_cloud/*' token cannot create notification channels.

PROJECT_ID.description: GCP project id the notification channel is created in. Must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{4,28}[a-z0-9]$ (validated before the request is built).

TOPIC_NAME.description: Short name of the EXISTING Pub/Sub topic incidents should be published to (create it first with 'GCP: Create Pub/Sub Topic'). Must match ^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9._~+%-]{2,254}$ and must not start with 'goog'.

DISPLAY_NAME.description: Human-readable channel name shown in the Cloud Monitoring console. Capped at 100 characters; control characters are stripped.

setup_instructions.title: Create the topic first
setup_instructions.detail: Run 'GCP: Create Pub/Sub Topic' (or create the topic manually). The channel's labels.topic must point at an existing topic for notifications to flow.

setup_instructions.title: Grant write-tier consent
setup_instructions.detail: Complete the WRITE-tier OAuth flow via '/api/gcp/connect-write' and set AUTH_HEADER to 'Bearer vault://oauth/google_cloud_write/{your_user_id}/{your_provider_key}/access_token'.

setup_instructions.title: Attach the channel to alerting policies
setup_instructions.detail: In Cloud Monitoring, attach the returned channel_name to the alerting policies whose incidents should reach Talos. Combined with 'GCP: Create Push Subscription', incidents then flow topic → subscription → Talos watch channel (see docs/gcp-push-setup.md).

setup_instructions.title: Re-runs are safe
setup_instructions.detail: The module pre-checks for an existing pubsub channel with the same labels.topic and returns already_existed=true instead of creating a duplicate — safe to include in an idempotent provisioning workflow.
